agent_output: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"E-commerce platform managing the product purchase lifecycle from cart management through checkout, payment, and post-sale refunds. The system must handle inventory reservation, promotional pricing, discount codes, and time-bound processes (checkout expiry, refund windows).","bounded_context":"Order Management — encompassing Cart, Checkout, Inventory Reservation, Pricing/Promotions, Payment, and Refund subdomains","ubiquitous_language":[{"term":"Cart","definition":"A transient collection of items a customer intends to purchase. Items in the cart do NOT reserve inventory."},{"term":"Checkout","definition":"The process initiated when a customer commits to purchasing cart contents. Triggers inventory reservation and must be completed with payment within 15 minutes."},{"term":"Inventory Reservation","definition":"A time-limited hold on inventory units, created when checkout begins, preventing other customers from purchasing those units. Released if payment is not received within 15 minutes."},{"term":"Promotion","definition":"A platform-initiated discount applied to a specific product (e.g., 20% off). A product may have at most one active promotion at any time."},{"term":"Discount Code","definition":"A customer-supplied code that applies a discount. Mutually exclusive with promotional pricing — only one discount mechanism applies per order."},{"term":"Discount Mechanism","definition":"Any source of price reduction — either a Promotion or a Discount Code. Exactly one may apply per order, never both."},{"term":"Abandoned Checkout","definition":"A checkout session where payment has not been confirmed within the 15-minute reservation window."},{"term":"Payment Confirmation","definition":"The irreversible event that finalizes an order. After this point, the order becomes immutable."},{"term":"Refund Window","definition":"The 30-day period after delivery during which a customer may request a refund."},{"term":"Listed Product","definition":"A product visible in the catalog. Visibility does not imply purchasability — zero-inventory products may be listed but cannot be purchased."}]},"business_rules":[{"id":"BR-1","rule":"Inventory is NOT reserved when items are added to the cart. Reservation occurs only when checkout begins.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"If inventory were reserved at cart-add time, the system's inventory accounting would be corrupted — phantom holds would starve real buyers. This is a core data consistency constraint.","testable_assertion":"Adding an item to a cart does not decrement available inventory or create any reservation record."},{"id":"BR-2","rule":"Inventory reservations are released if payment is not confirmed within 15 minutes of checkout initiation.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"The 15-minute window is a business policy choice balancing customer experience against inventory lock-up. A VP could change this to 10 or 20 minutes.","testable_assertion":"Given a checkout started at time T, if no payment is confirmed by T+15min, all associated inventory reservations are released and inventory is restored to available pool."},{"id":"BR-3","rule":"A product can have a maximum of one active promotion at a time.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Multiple simultaneous promotions on one product would create ambiguous pricing — the system cannot determine which price to show. This is a data integrity constraint preventing contradictory state.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to activate a second promotion on a product that already has an active promotion is rejected."},{"id":"BR-4","rule":"Discount codes cannot be combined with promotional pricing. Only one discount mechanism applies per order.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Allowing stacking would produce prices not sanctioned by any single business decision. The system must enforce that exactly zero or one discount mechanism is applied, preventing unintended margin erosion.","testable_assertion":"When an order contains a product with an active promotion and a customer applies a discount code, the system applies only one and rejects or overrides the other."},{"id":"BR-5","rule":"Orders cannot be modified after payment is confirmed.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Post-payment immutability is a financial integrity constraint. Modifying a paid order would desynchronize payment records, inventory, and fulfillment state, corrupting the system.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to add, remove, or change items or quantities on an order whose payment status is 'confirmed' is rejected."},{"id":"BR-6","rule":"A product with zero available inventory cannot be purchased, even if the product is still listed in the catalog.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Selling inventory that does not exist violates physical constraints and would result in unfulfillable orders — a corrupt system state.","testable_assertion":"Attempting to check out a product with zero available inventory results in a rejection, regardless of the product's catalog listing status."},{"id":"BR-7","rule":"Refunds must be requested within 30 days of delivery date.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"The 30-day refund window is a customer service policy. It could be extended to 60 days during holiday seasons or shortened for certain product categories without corrupting system state.","testable_assertion":"A refund request submitted more than 30 days after the recorded delivery date is rejected."}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","given":"A customer has items in their cart","when":"The customer adds another item to the cart","then":"No inventory reservation is created and available inventory count for that product remains unchanged"},{"id":"AC-2","given":"A customer with items in their cart initiates checkout","when":"Checkout begins","then":"Inventory is reserved for each item in the cart, reducing available inventory by the corresponding quantities"},{"id":"AC-3","given":"A checkout was initiated 15 minutes ago and payment has not been confirmed","when":"The reservation timer expires","then":"All inventory reservations for that checkout session are released, available inventory is restored, and the checkout session is marked as abandoned"},{"id":"AC-4","given":"A product already has an active promotion","when":"An admin attempts to activate a second promotion on the same product","then":"The system rejects the new promotion and the existing promotion remains unchanged"},{"id":"AC-5","given":"A customer's order contains a product with an active promotion","when":"The customer applies a discount code","then":"Only one discount mechanism is applied to the order; the system either applies the more favorable one or requires the customer to choose, but never stacks both"},{"id":"AC-6","given":"An order has been paid and payment is confirmed","when":"Any attempt is made to modify the order (add/remove/change items)","then":"The modification is rejected and the order remains unchanged"},{"id":"AC-7","given":"A product is listed in the catalog but has zero available inventory","when":"A customer attempts to purchase that product","then":"The purchase is blocked with a clear out-of-stock message, even though the product page is visible"},{"id":"AC-8","given":"An order was delivered 31 or more days ago","when":"The customer requests a refund","then":"The refund request is rejected with a message indicating the refund window has expired"},{"id":"AC-9","given":"An order was delivered within the last 30 days","when":"The customer requests a refund","then":"The refund request is accepted for processing"},{"id":"AC-10","given":"A checkout is in progress with reserved inventory","when":"Another customer attempts to purchase the last unit of the same product","then":"The second customer is blocked because inventory is reserved, not available"},{"id":"AC-11","given":"A customer has a discount code and the cart contains only non-promotional items","when":"The customer applies the discount code at checkout","then":"The discount code is applied successfully"},{"id":"AC-12","given":"A checkout reservation has been released due to abandonment","when":"The customer returns and attempts to check out again","then":"A new checkout session is started and inventory reservation is re-attempted (may fail if inventory was claimed by others)"}],"edge_cases":[{"scenario":"Customer begins checkout, inventory is reserved, but the last unit is returned to stock by another abandoned checkout during the 15-minute window","expected_behavior":"The reservation system must handle concurrent reservation releases and new reservations atomically to prevent overselling"},{"scenario":"A promotion is deactivated while a customer is mid-checkout with that promotional price","expected_behavior":"The price locked at checkout initiation should be honored for that session; the promotion change should not retroactively affect in-flight checkouts"},{"scenario":"Customer applies a discount code to an order where some items are on promotion and some are not","expected_behavior":"The mutual exclusivity rule applies per order — the system must resolve which single discount mechanism applies across the entire order, not mix-and-match per line item"},{"scenario":"Payment confirmation arrives at exactly the 15-minute mark","expected_behavior":"The system needs a clear boundary — either the reservation is still valid at exactly T+15min or it is not. A race condition here could result in a confirmed payment for released inventory"},{"scenario":"Product inventory drops to zero between cart-add and checkout initiation","expected_behavior":"Since cart does not reserve inventory, checkout initiation must validate current inventory and reject items that are no longer available"},{"scenario":"Refund requested on exactly day 30 after delivery","expected_behavior":"Day 30 should be within the refund window (30 days inclusive). The boundary must be clearly defined — likely end-of-day on the 30th day."},{"scenario":"Customer abandons checkout, reservation is released, then completes a new checkout within seconds","expected_behavior":"New checkout must re-reserve inventory from scratch. If another buyer claimed the units in the interim, the new checkout fails for those items."},{"scenario":"Admin activates a promotion on a product that is currently in active checkout sessions with a discount code applied","expected_behavior":"In-flight checkouts should honor the pricing locked at checkout start. The new promotion applies only to future checkouts."}],"business_impact":{"financial":"Incorrect inventory reservation logic could lead to overselling (fulfillment costs, customer compensation) or underselling (lost revenue from unnecessarily blocked inventory). Discount stacking bugs could cause unintended margin erosion. The 15-minute window directly impacts conversion rate vs inventory availability trade-off.","operational":"Reservation expiry requires a reliable timer/scheduler mechanism. Concurrent checkout sessions on low-inventory products create contention that must be handled without deadlocks. Refund window enforcement reduces manual dispute handling.","user":"Customers expect items visible in catalog to be purchasable — showing listed but unpurchasable products may cause frustration. The 15-minute checkout window pressures customers but is standard in e-commerce. Clear communication about why a discount code was rejected (due to existing promotion) is critical for customer satisfaction.","risk":"Race conditions at the 15-minute reservation boundary are the highest technical risk. Overselling due to inventory bugs is the highest business risk. Discount stacking exploits could be discovered and shared, causing rapid margin erosion.","stakeholders_affected":[{"group":"Customers","impact":"Directly affected by checkout time pressure, discount limitations, refund windows, and inventory availability. Poor UX around these rules drives cart abandonment."},{"group":"Product/Merchandising Team","impact":"Owns promotion lifecycle. The one-promotion-per-product constraint limits bundling strategies. Must coordinate promotion timing carefully."},{"group":"Finance/Accounting","impact":"Discount mutual exclusivity and post-payment immutability are critical for revenue recognition accuracy. Refund window policy affects cash flow forecasting."},{"group":"Warehouse/Fulfillment","impact":"Depends on accurate inventory counts. Overselling creates fulfillment failures and return logistics costs."},{"group":"Customer Support","impact":"Handles refund disputes at the 30-day boundary and complaints about failed checkouts. Clear system behavior reduces support ticket volume."}]},"confidence":{"level":82,"reasoning":"The spec is well-articulated with clear, non-contradictory rules. Most rules are directly testable. Confidence is not higher because several behavioral details are unspecified (see low-confidence areas), but these are implementation decisions rather than contradictions or ambiguities in the stated rules.","high_confidence_areas":["Inventory is not reserved at cart-add time — explicitly stated","15-minute reservation expiry — clear time boundary","One active promotion per product — unambiguous constraint","Post-payment order immutability — clearly stated","Zero-inventory blocks purchase — explicitly stated","30-day refund window from delivery — clear policy"],"low_confidence_areas":["Which discount mechanism wins when both a promotion and discount code could apply — the spec says only one applies but does not specify selection logic (customer chooses? best price? promotion always wins?)","Whether the 30-day refund window is calendar days or business days","Whether 'delivery' means delivery confirmation date or shipped date","Whether the 15-minute timer is hard (reservation auto-released by system) or soft (checked at payment time)","Whether the one-discount-per-order rule means per-order or per-line-item — spec says 'per order' but real-world e-commerce often varies","Price locking semantics during checkout — is price locked at checkout start or at payment confirmation?"],"assumptions":["The 15-minute reservation timer is enforced automatically by the system, not merely checked at payment time","The refund window of 30 days is measured in calendar days from the delivery confirmation date","The mutual exclusivity of discounts applies at the order level, not per line item, as the spec states 'per order'","Listed products with zero inventory are intentionally kept visible for SEO or waitlist purposes"]},"escalations":[],"rejection_reasons":[]}
